weekly_summary:
# This Week's Small-Cap Watch List

We're keeping an eye on five stocks this week—UP, ASPN, VITL, WNC, and ATOM—but none of them are hitting our buy criteria just yet. We'll be watching for the right entry points as the week unfolds.
